item.title: Germany Has Ratcheted Up Defense Spending. In Europe, That Worries Some People.
item.description: Soon the country’s armed forces budget could exceed those of Britain and France combined. In Paris, there are concerns that European “strategic autono...

item.title: Texas and North Carolina Elections Will Test Older House Democrats’ Staying Power
item.description: Starting in North Carolina on Tuesday, older House Democrats face a test of their staying power and the appetite of voters to replace them.

item.title: Trump’s Foreign Policy Vision: Imperialism
item.description: Donald Trump’s foreign policy vision is imperialism

item.title: Veterans Affairs Department Cut Thousands of Roles for Doctors and Nurses
item.description: The Trump administration has eliminated health care positions left vacant after a wave of resignations and retirements at the V.A. last year.

item.title: Tariffs Confound Small Businesses Again
item.description: Chocolate makers and fig-paste importers are facing a tangle of unknowns, including whether to seek refunds for tariffs invalidated by the Supreme Cou...
